acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Blocker reports are validated by just qd-reports-check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh sources scripts/qd-report-check/blocker.sh and iterates reports/qd/*/blocker.md.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Blocker report node ids map to roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validate_blocker_node_exists rejects a blocker path whose parent directory is not a qd node id.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Active blocked-node blockers include required actionable fields.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validate_active_blocker requires labeled platform, command or operation, missing condition, evidence, unblock path, and existing evidence/<node-id>/ paths.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Done-node blockers are marked historical or superseded.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validate_historical_blocker requires Superseded: or Historical:, and existing done-node blockers now include those markers.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Malformed blocker reports are rejected by focused negative smokes.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This qd checker contract does not require product runtime, hardware, workflow dispatch, or live credentials.
